hooks.command: if [ "${HARNESS_AUTOMATED}" != "1" ]; then if [ -f gradlew ]; then ./gradlew build 2>&1 && ./gradlew test 2>&1; elif [ -f mvnw ]; then ./mvnw test 2>&1; elif [ -f package.json ]; then npm run build 2>&1 && npm test 2>&1; fi; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi
